code:
import io
import string

let input = io.read_to_end()
let n = string.len(input)
mut sum = 0
mut count = 0
mut i = 0
mut cur = 0
mut has = false
mut neg = false
while i < n
  let bopt = string.byte_at(input, i)
  match bopt
  when Some(b)
    if b >= 48 and b <= 57
      cur = cur * 10 + (b - 48)
      has = true
    else if b == 45
      if not has
        neg = true
      end
    else
      if has
        if neg
          sum = sum - cur
        else
          sum = sum + cur
        end
        count = count + 1
      end
      cur = 0
      has = false
      neg = false
    end
  when None
    ()
  end
  i = i + 1
end
if has
  if neg
    sum = sum - cur
  else
    sum = sum + cur
  end
  count = count + 1
end
let avg = sum / count
println("avg=#{avg}")
